label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out which present Alice ends up with after all those swaps. Let me start by keeping track of each person's present step by step. Initially, the presents are: - Alice: white - Bob: green - Claire: yellow - Dave: purple - Eve: pink ball Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap one by one. First swap: Alice and Dave swap. So Alice gives her white present to Dave, and Dave gives his purple present to Alice. After this swap: - Alice has purple - Dave has white Others remain the same: Bob green, Claire yellow, Eve pink. Second swap: Claire and Dave swap. Now, Claire (yellow) swaps with Dave (white). So Claire gets white, Dave gets yellow. Now: - Alice: purple - Dave: yellow - Claire: white Bob and Eve still have green and pink. Third swap: Dave and Eve swap. Dave has yellow, Eve has pink. After swapping: - Dave gets pink - Eve gets yellow So now: - Alice: purple - Dave: pink - Claire: white - Eve: yellow Bob still has green. Fourth swap: Bob and Dave swap. Bob has green, Dave has pink. Swap them: - Bob gets pink - Dave gets green Now: - Alice: purple - Bob: pink - Dave: green - Claire: white - Eve: yellow Fifth swap: Dave and Claire swap. Dave has green, Claire has white. Swap: - Dave gets white - Claire gets green So after all swaps, Alice still has purple? Let me check again to make sure I didn't make a mistake. Wait, let me write down each step again to confirm: Start: A: white B: green C: yellow D: purple E: pink 1. A and D swap: A: purple D: white Others same. 2. C and D swap: C gets white (from D), D gets yellow (from C) So now: A: purple D: yellow C: white 3. D and E swap: D (yellow) and E (pink) swap. So D gets pink, E gets yellow. Now: D: pink E: yellow A: purple C: white 4. B and D swap: B (green) and D (pink) swap. B gets pink, D gets green. Now: B: pink D: green A: purple C: white E: yellow 5. D
